allow: Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/data/vibeCodingData.js''\).then\(m => { console.log\(''Nodes:'', m.vibeCodingNodes.length\); console.log\(''Edges:'', m.vibeCodingEdges.length\); console.log\(''Root node:'', JSON.stringify\(m.vibeCodingNodes[0].data.title\)\); console.log\(''First edge:'', JSON.stringify\(m.vibeCodingEdges[0]\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/data/vibeCodingData.js''\).then\(m => { const root = m.vibeCodingNodes.find\(n => n.id === ''node-4''\); console.log\(''Root pos:'', root.position\); console.log\(''Total nodes:'', m.vibeCodingNodes.length\); console.log\(''Total edges:'', m.vibeCodingEdges.length\); const withBlocks = m.vibeCodingNodes.filter\(n => n.data.blocks !== undefined\); console.log\(''Nodes with blocks:'', withBlocks.length\); const withImages = m.vibeCodingNodes.filter\(n => n.data.blocks && n.data.blocks.some && n.data.blocks.some\(b => b.type === ''image''\)\); console.log\(''Nodes with images:'', withImages.length\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "import\(''./src/data/vibeCodingData.js''\).then\(m => { const root = m.vibeCodingNodes.find\(n => n.id === ''node-4''\); console.log\(''Root pos:'', root.position\); console.log\(''Total nodes:'', m.vibeCodingNodes.length\); console.log\(''Total edges:'', m.vibeCodingEdges.length\); }\)")
